balanceOf(address).details: Balance is expressed in receipt tokens.

exchangeRate(uint32).details: returns 0 if the _unwindingEpochs is not valid or if there are no locks for this duration

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

rewardWeight(address).details: Reward weight is expressed in "virtual receipt tokens" and is used to compute the rewards earned during yield distribution.

setBucketMultiplier(uint32,uint256).details: note that this won't affect the unwinding users, unless they cancel their unwinding

totalBalance().details: note that due to rounding down in the protocol's favor, this might be slightly above the sum of the balanceOf() of all users.

applyLosses(uint256).notice: Apply losses to the locking module

balanceOf(address).notice: get the balance of a user by looping through all the enabled unwinding epochs and looking at how many share tokens the user has, then multiplying for each of them by the current share price.

cancelUnwinding(address,uint256,uint32).notice: Cancel an ongoing unwinding. All checks are performed by the Unwinding module.

core().notice: address of the Core contract referenced

depositRewards(uint256).notice: Deposit rewards into the locking module

emergencyAction((address,uint256,bytes)[.notice: due to inflexibility of current smart contracts, add this ability to be able to execute arbitrary calldata against arbitrary addresses. callable only by governor

enableBucket(uint32,address,uint256).notice: enable a new unwinding epochs duration

enabledBuckets(uint256).notice: array of all enabled unwinding epochs

exchangeRate(uint32).notice: get the current exchange rate between the receiptToken and a given shareToken. This function is here for convenience, to help share token holders estimate the value of their tokens.

increaseUnwindingEpochs(uint256,uint32,u.notice: Increase the unwinding period of a position

rewardMultiplier().notice: multiplier to apply to totalBalance() for computing rewards in profit distribution, Expressed as a WAD (18 decimals). Should be between [1.0e18, 2.0e18] realistically.

rewardWeight(address).notice: get the reward weight of a user by looping through all the enabled unwinding epochs and looking at how many share tokens the user has, then multiplying for each of them by the current reward weight of these shares.

rewardWeightForUnwindingEpochs(address,u.notice: get the reward weight of a user

setBucketMultiplier(uint32,uint256).notice: update the multiplier of a given bucket

setCore(address).notice: WARNING CALLING THIS FUNCTION CAN POTENTIALLY BRICK A CONTRACT IF CORE IS SET INCORRECTLYset new reference to core only callable by governor

shareToken(uint32).notice: get the shares token of a given unwindingEpochs, 0 if not enabled

shares(address,uint32).notice: get the shares of a user for a given unwindingEpochs

totalBalance().notice: total balance of receipt tokens in the module

unwindingEpochsEnabled(uint32).notice: returns true if the given unwinding epochs is enabled for locking

withdraw(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw after an unwinding period has completed
